calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2024 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine The Persons Entitled To Distribution
Off Calendar May-07-2024 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar May-16-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 28, 2021 is admitted to probate. Elizabeth G. Eckert is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $20,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 18, 2024 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Karen Ann Simmons is appointed Probate Referree.

Judge; Stephen Murphy; Clerk: Ateesh Datt; Deputy: Cristobal; Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Apr-20-2023 Continued To May-16-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
